questions: What is my life path number?
How to calculate life path number?
What do numbers mean in numerology?
numerology te number diye ki bujhi?
answers: Numerology is the belief that numbers have mystical significance and can reveal insights about your personality, life purpose, and destiny. Your life path number is calculated from your birth date.

In numerology, each number from 1-9 has a unique meaning. Your life path number is found by adding all digits of your birthdate until you get a single digit. It's considered the most important number in your chart.
Numerology holo number er mystical meaning niye study. Tomar birthday theke life path number ber kora jay, jeta tomar personality ar life purpose indicate kore.

Numerology assigns meaning to numbers and their vibrations. To find your life path number, add up all digits in your birth date and reduce to a single digit. Each number carries different energy and personality traits.
